stemHtml: On a cold winter day with OAT of -8°C you are being radar vectored. You (1) _____ within the coverage of a navigation aid to cross-check your position. The given altitude by ATC (2) _____.

options.a: (1) not expect to be (2) is not temperature corrected
options.b: (1) not expect to be (2) is temperature corrected
options.c: (1) expect to be (2) is not temperature corrected
options.d: (1) expect to be (2) is temperature corrected
